rows.label: tlk45420151_02_msg0001
rows.name:
The other night, after I'd
been drinking, I got questioned
by these military types.

rows.label: tlk45420151_02_msg0002
rows.name:
They were asking if I had anything
to do with that mechanical girl.

rows.label: tlk45420151_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Come on, that'd never happen.
I wouldn't start a huge fight
in the heart of the capital!

rows.label: tlk45420151_02_msg0004
rows.name:
The imperial army got badly
beaten by her, so now they're
desperate to find her.

rows.label: tlk45420151_02_msg0005
rows.name:
If I were you, I'd be careful not
to arouse any suspicion. They'll
latch on to most anything lately.
